title: codiaeum luzonicum
intro: Codiaeum luzonicum, also known as the 'Golden Croton', is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Codiaeum luzonicum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
